results.overview: On Christmas Eve, divorced dad Scott Calvin and his son discover Santa Claus has fallen off their roof. When Scott takes the reins of the magical sleigh, he finds he is now the new Santa, and must convince a world of disbelievers, including himself.
results.title: The Santa Clause

results.name: The Santa Clauses
results.overview: After nearly three decades of being Santa Claus, Scott Calvin’s magic begins to falter. As he struggles to keep up with the demands of the job, he discovers a new clause that forces him to rethink his role as Santa and as a father.

results.name: Pyrus: The Greatest Santa Clause
results.overview:
Pyrus is a young elf who lives in The Danish National Archives, where Chief Archivist Birger Bertramsen work alongside his new assistant Josefine Brahe. The young elf lives together with the old Archivist elf Gyldengrød and the elf girl Kandis, who just moved in and the.

Pyrus complains that he cannot get Christmas-presents, as Santa Claus doesn't give presents to elf's. Pyrus tries to conjure him with the help of a magical book to talk to him, but unfortunately Santa Claus is already in the National Archives when he does, which results in Clause losing his memories. Now the elf's must help Clause regain his memories by visiting historical events using the books in the archive. They meeting Saint Nicholas (the predecessor of Santa Claus), La Befana (who comes bearing gifts in Italy) and the American Santa Claus.

Better watch out! The big guy in red is coming to town once again. This time, Scott Calvin -- also known as Santa Claus -- finds out there's an obscure clause in his contract requiring him to take on a wife. He has to leave the North Pole to fulfill his obligations, or else he'll be forced to give up his Yuletide gig.
results.title: The Santa Clause 2

results.original_title: The Santa Clause 3: The Escape Clause
results.overview: Now that Santa and Mrs. Claus have the North Pole running smoothly, the Counsel of Legendary Figures has called an emergency meeting on Christmas Eve! The evil Jack Frost has been making trouble, looking to take over the holiday! So he launches a plan to sabotage the toy factory and compel Scott to invoke the little-known Escape Clause and wish he'd never become Santa.
results.title: The Santa Clause 3: The Escape Clause

results.original_title: ひなくり2019 ～17人のサンタクロースと空のクリスマス～
results.overview: HINAKURI 2019 ~Seventeen Santa Clauses and Christmas in the Sky~ is a Christmas concert performed by Hinatazaka46. The concert is performed over 2 days on the 17th and 18th December 2019. A total of 40,000 came to watch the concert.
results.title: HINAKURI 2019 ~Seventeen Santa Clauses and Christmas in the Sky~

results.overview: Super Santa Clause is no regular Saint Nick. When his bag of presents is stolen, he handles the problem himself. A 5 minute action comedy shot in the rough edged style of late Soviet and post Soviet cinema.
results.title: Super Santa Clause

results.original_title: ひなくり2020 ～おばけホテルと22人のサンタクロース～
results.overview: HINAKURI 2020 is the 2nd installment of the annual Hinatazaka46 Christmas Concert series. Because of COVID-19, the concert was live-streamed on Christmas Eve.
results.title: HINAKURI 2020 ~Obake Hotel and 22 Santa Clauses~

results.overview: Santa Claus is up for retirement after his 300 years, and he searches New York City for a replacement.
results.title: In the Nick of Time
